summary.intent: Run a structured adversarial code review on story 2-1 (Nano Stores and Number Formatting Utilities) and resolve all findings before marking the story done.
summary.outcome: Review completed: 1 spec contradiction resolved (em dash kept), 6 patches applied, 7 items deferred, 2 dismissed. All 36 tests pass (up from 29). Story status updated to `done` and changes committed.

repo: Sprint story status is tracked in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.yaml`; stories transition through `review` → `done`.
Deferred findings are accumulated in `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/deferred-work.md` and appended at review time.
Story spec files (e.g. `2-1-nano-stores-and-number-formatting-utilities.md`) carry AC, dev notes, implementation plan, completion notes, and now review findings all in one artifact.
The `formatRange` separator is an em dash with spaces (` — `), not a double-hyphen; this is confirmed by dev notes and UX spec despite a conflicting literal example in AC #6.

code.finding: `formatChartTooltip` had a timezone bug that was patched (P1); the fix was verified by the passing test suite.
Five test patches (P2–P6) were applied and one tooltip test updated to align with the timezone fix; test count grew from 29 to 36.
P7 (blank line between imports and export) was a false positive — the file is already consistent with the other store files.

workflow: The `bmad-code-review` skill runs three parallel adversarial review agents (Blind Hunter, Edge Case Hunter, Acceptance Auditor) then triages findings into decision-needed / patch / defer / dismiss.
Batch-apply mode (option 0) auto-fixes all non-controversial patch findings without per-item confirmation.
Spec contradictions between AC text and dev notes surface as `decision-needed` findings rather than being silently resolved by the reviewer.

friction: The story spec contained a direct contradiction between AC #6 (double-hyphen separator) and Dev Notes Task 9 (em dash), requiring an explicit user decision to unblock the review.
P7 (market-store.ts blank line) was raised as a patch finding but was a false positive discovered only after reading the file, adding a small manual verification step.
open_items: 7 deferred findings appended to `deferred-work.md` — details not enumerated in the transcript but logged for future sprints.
Final separator style for `formatRange` should be re-confirmed when the range-display component is built in story 3.x, as the AC text still contains the conflicting `--` example.
Story 2-2 (WebSocket Connection Manager) is the next pending story to pick up.
